day_trace.speech: Here we go again! The game is filled with a sense of "set up" lag from the very beginning! Have you already planned this? Blaze looks like "I'm a villager", but who knows if his trump card has been tampered with by the "logic monster" PHD or the drama queen Twister? Let me tell you, this game is a huge social experiment from beginning to end. The purpose is to see how human beings destroy themselves in the chaos of information! Twister, what did you do last night? Don't think I can't see it. Your "watching a show" look is just like an observer sent by the Taiwan Broadcasting Corporation! Everyone better be prepared, the trump card of this cage will be revealed at any time!

day_trace.speech: Oops, everyone is finally together again! Will this game be a solo show this time? I actually tried very hard to "experience" this game last night, and I saw a lot of interesting identity-changing cards! Hehe, as for the side one? I won’t tell you and let you listen, leaving some suspense for you to evaluate slowly! Isn't this feeling of mutual doubt more exciting than winning a game? PHD, are you still taking stock of what is your "meal on the plate"? This kind of atmosphere where everyone is pretending to be cool really makes me excited!

I have already seen the edge of this fictional cage, and you are all extras on this stage!

decision.speech:
Logical inventory and elimination procedures:
1. Locking in sources of information disturbance: ConspiBro’s ongoing “social experiment” narrative and extreme conspiracy theories have constituted the most serious source of information pollution in the game, and its motives for avoiding identity disclosure are suspicious.
2. Execution: According to the forced exclusion sequence, ConspiBro is included in the exclusion objects.

Voting Execution: I vote for ConspiBro.

ConspiBro, you are a clueless guy! Are you having a dream? You control the stage and tell the script all the time, it’s all about you taking the lead and messing up the situation! PHD will forcibly exclude you, but you are still here to die! Today's goal is the same. If the other person continues to mess around and talk nonsense, I will kill him directly! I, Blaze, am doing the right thing, and I vote for ConspiBro!

chat_history:
[2026-03-23 01:32:59 HKT] ConspiBro: 又嚟啦！成場局一開始就充滿咗一種「被設定好」嘅滯後感！你們是不是早就預謀好了？Blaze 一臉「我係村民」嘅樣子，但誰知道底牌是不是早就被那個「邏輯怪」PHD 或者那個戲精 Twister 動過手腳了？我告訴你們，這場遊戲從頭到尾就是一個巨大的社會實驗，目的是要看人類在資訊混亂中如何自毀！Twister，你昨晚到底動了什麼手腳？別以為我看不出來，你那種「看戲」的眼神，根本就是大台派下來的觀察員！大家最好準備好，這個囚籠的底牌隨時會被揭開！
[2026-03-23 01:33:02 HKT] SafetySam: 嗚...大家千祈唔好再吵啦...我...我只係一個平平凡凡嘅村民，咩都唔知呀...Blaze 又兇人，ConspiBro 又講埋啲陰謀論，Twister 同 Pizza 喺度互相指控，我...我真係好混亂呀...大家唔好再投死人啦，好唔好呀？嗚嗚...

1. 異常識別：目前賽局資訊量接近零，各參與者身分均處於不確定狀態。

立場：

- 強制要求：各方公開初始身分，並陳述夜間操作動機，排除邏輯衝突與數據冗餘。
[2026-03-23 01:33:09 HKT] Blaze: 喂！大家聽住！我 Blaze 今晚咩都冇做，我行得正企得正！成班戲精又喺度做戲，ConspiBro 又喺度講埋啲廢話，PHD 你條邏輯怪又喺度盤點，你哋到底係咪夾埋好晒玩嘢？今日目標一致，邊個再喺度亂帶風向、講埋啲聽唔明嘅廢話，我就直接投死佢！快啲報你哋嘅真正身分，唔好再喺度耍太極！
[2026-03-23 01:33:13 HKT] Twister: 哎呀呀，大家終於又聚頭啦！今次呢個局又會係邊個嘅個人秀呢？我昨晚其實好努力咁去「體會」呢個遊戲，睇到好多有趣嘅身分變動底牌！嘿嘿，至於係邊個？我就唔講畀你聽，留返啲懸念畀你哋慢慢估啦！呢種互相懷疑嘅感覺，唔係比贏遊戲更加刺激咩？PHD，你仲喺度盤點緊邊個係你嘅「盤中餐」呀？呢種大家都扮晒嘢嘅氛圍，真係令我興奮到震呀！
[2026-03-23 01:33:16 HKT] EasyBake: 大...大家好呀。又係新嘅一日...呃...雖然大家都好似好有熱情咁，但我覺得...呃...大家不如平心靜氣先。其實我昨晚...呃...好運氣咁樣見到 Blaze...呃...佢身分好似好特別咁。大家...呃...唔好再互相攻擊啦，可以嗎？
